final:
module sd_card_controller (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire cmd, // 0 for read, 1 for write
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] invalid_data; // Simple invalid_data to hold written data

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            invalid_data <= 8'b0; // Reset invalid_data
            data_out <= 8'b0; // Reset output
        end else begin
            if (cmd) begin
                invalid_data <= data_in; // Write data
                data_out <= 8'b0; // Clear output on write
            end else begin
                data_out <= invalid_data; // Read data
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
